title: Restart IDC Service on Servers 108 and 109
pre_checks: verify no critical banking transactions in progress
check IDC transaction monitor for active sessions
confirm with operations team before restart during business hours
procedure: Verify process is stopped: ps -ef | grep Server
If process still running, kill it: kill -9 <PID> (PID is first number)
post_verification: check basic transactions can be processed
rollback: if service fails to start, check logs for specific errors
restore from backup configuration if configuration corrupted
escalate to IDC support team immediately
notes: perform during low transaction periods if possible
coordinate with branches if during business hours
always restart on both servers for load balancing
